name: Tigergriffin
description:
[collapse=Quick disclaimer!]2 quick things- 
1. I DON'T have a pussy by default. Even then, you have to catch me at a really good time, or have a REALLY good idea for me to let you put one on me.
2. I'm into a [u]lot[/u] of kinks. Sometimes, I'll be so dead set on one that I won't want to do anything else, but usually I'm pretty open to most things. So please don't be mad if I'm not in the mood for your thing right now, and if that mood lasts a while.[/collapse]


[color=pink][i][center][b]Hyper: ✅ | Macro: ✅ | Growth: ❤️ | IC Approaches: ✅ | OOC Approaches: ✅ | Any Perspective: ✅
Vaginal: Meh | Anal: ❤️❤️[/b][/center][/i][/color]

[hr]
[center][color=orange]Rhiley '[color=brown]Tiger[/color]' Griffin [/color]
[sub]or,[/sub][/center][b][color=purple][center][big]𝐓𝔦𝖌𝔢𝐫𝖌𝐫𝔦𝐟𝐟𝔦ռ[/big][/center][/color][/b]
[hr]
[center][img=2188691]MacroTiger2pointO[/img][/center]
[quote][center]"So I suppose the first thing I should ask would be; just how high are your limits?~"[/center][/quote]
Seriously, that's not an exaggeration. More times than not, I'll be asking exactly that. I like things [b]Big[/b]- if not starting that size, then having a hell of a good time getting them that big. Because of this, vanilla play is a bit less common with me, unfortunately. Usually, I'll need at least hyper-lite.
Excessive sizes are absolutely adored here, but if you'd rather not measure up, we might be able to make up for it in enough other kinks.

[indent]
[color=yellow][collapse=The Beak Problem]
[color=gray]You might've noticed, she's got this odd thing on her face called a[/color] beak. [color=gray]Problem is, plenty of people aren't fond of those- and even for the rest, they aren't exactly known for their ability to smooch.
So, I've devised a way to fix this- Though unfortunately, it uses a little bit of meta stuff.
Basically- she switches between a beak, and a normal cat mouth, without any sort of canon change. It just happens, instantly, and there's absolutely no attention brought to it. In one moment you can kiss her on the beak, and in the next she can bring her newfound lips to yours, and there's no transformation in between. It just happens, with no impact on the scene or the lore or anything. This way, she can still do the stuff with either part, in even very well-grounded RPs.- As long as you're fine with that happening.

Other than that, you could ask to do one of two things- for her to stick to one choice, or for her to actually have some sort of magical ability to do it in a canon way.[/color][/collapse][/color]
[color=pink][collapse=Personality]
[color=gray]To be honest, this character’s personality is very, very flexible. So I figured, I’d try to lay out a few of the main ways I might end up playing her. None of them are set in stone, and it’s rare that I’ll ever abide by any specific one of them, usually more of a mix.

-[b]Prim and Proper[/b]- Not exactly as it says, but just a lot leaning towards that. Using fancier words, being polite, but still, being sure to make sure her desires come true, albeit in a bit more of a cunning, kind on the surface way.

-[b]Mommy Rhiley[/b]- Exactly what it sounds like. Motherly, caring, nurturing- But sometimes, ‘Mother knows best’, and she’ll do things as she wants, under the guise of wanting what’s best for you. Because what’s best for you, is helping her live out her most wonderful fantasies.

-[b]Athletic[/b]- She played Ice Hockey once, and she can definitely take the role of a jock. Whether it’s more of a friendly one like usual, where she’s just kind exactly what you’d expect from a girl sports player- or more of the stereotypical high school jock- she’ll be sure to have some fun, and make it known she still [i]got it.[/i]

-[b]Slutty[/b]- She’s just an absolute slut. She’s cunning, doing everything she can to get that good stuff- Working her way into people’s hearts and pants. Taking a cock in every hole, against every paw, hand, and even her cleavage- Yet even still, reaching for more with her wings and tail. She’s determined, absolutely on a mission to take as much as she possibly can. Whether it’s an unimaginable amount from one person, or the recipient of a hundred person gangbang.

-[b]Demanding[/b]- She's in charge, in control, and in power. She'll use you like a toy, or ignore you like she isn't even aware you're there. A rarer one, unfortunately.

-[b]Bimbo/Drunk[/b]- Starting to be an odd favorite for me. Dumb gryphon can only think about sex, or is so, so easy to fool into doing what you want. Being under your power, falling victim to the simplest little tricks you use, even though either way, she'd be fully on board. Something about it is just so, so good.

[small](I hope it doesn’t come off as me being lazy for refusing to stick to one. Tiger’s just my fursona, so I feel like I’m limiting myself too by narrowing it all down to something like that.)[/small]
[/color][/collapse][/color]
[color=orange][collapse=Variations, Abilities, and Possessions.][color=gray]
-- Variations --
[collapse=Taur Form]
Size - - 7 feet tall, 7 feet long.
Endowments - - 29 inches long, 6 inches wide (Varies and changes at times.)

The first extra form. Instead of normal legs, she’s got the whole bottom half of a gryphon. This leaves her at about 7 feet tall, with her whole body 8 feet long. Of course, this also adds to her endowments by quite a bit- Her length up to 29 inches long and 6 inches wide, as well as an enormous ass with the form, and some huge tits on her anthro half. [i]All of which so easy to grow even further, not to mention. [/i]

Should it fit the RP, small things like rubbing milk or seed against these parts would leave them growing- And of course, filling her up with it, or just soaking her whole body, would bring her to grow all around.
[/collapse][collapse=Naga Form]
WIP![/collapse]
-- Possessions --
[color=purple][collapse=Growth Dice][color=gray]Usually used in macro/micro room, but available anywhere!
She has 2 sets:
1 pair of multiplier dice (Red dice) (Multiplies her height, or the length/size of a body part)
1 pair of growth dice (White dice) (Sets her height or the length/size of something to whats rolled)
1 pair of shrinking dice (Black dice) (Sets her height or the length/size of something to whats rolled)
Dice can be set to take a certain amount of time to do their effect fully. The 1 side's dot has a hole with a button in it for that, though it's designed to be perfectly balanced.
Dice also choose their target by who they touched last- So if she were to throw them at you, and they then fell onto the ground and 'rolled', you'd get hit with the growth.[/color]
[/collapse][/color][color=black][collapse=Black Bracelet][color=gray]Just a plain looking black bracelet, except for one key thing.. When killed with it on, she just reappears somewhere else in the room. A fun little respawn device, basically. On by default in size-based and vore rooms. (The previous body stays though, if vored or in macro/micro room)[/color]
[/collapse][/color][color=pink][collapse=Size-perfume!][color=gray]A special little something me and a friend came up with. It comes with two little parts- Two small. labelled vials, and the bottle.
To put it simply- when someone sniffs the perfume, they will start to shrink.
To be immune to this, you drink the first vial.
To gain their lost size, you drink the second.

Also comes in growth flavor- Either leaving whoever's smelling it growing, or the person who drank the vial growing from being sniffed, without stealing their size.

[color=yellow]W[color=black]a[/color]r[color=black]n[/color]i[color=black]n[/color]g![/color]
Any more than a few sprays to each area, and it'll be a lot more dense. What does that mean? Well, as you get smaller and smaller, you'll be drinking in more and more with each breath- Leaving you shrinking faster and faster, almost exponentially! This can be avoided with just a small coat of the stuff, but you have to be careful!
[/color][/collapse][/color]
--Her Abillity (Whenever it applies)--
[collapse=Growing Purrs]Exactly what it sounds like, pretty much. As she purrs, things start to grow- It's completely up to her what, or even who, grows, but it's timed perfectly with the vibrations of her purring. The growth is faster if she's purring faster, and it's stronger if she's bigger to give some stronger purring- But that can also be affected by someone else's purring, murring, or the like. For example, if she's growing someone bigger, and they purr against her too, they'll start growing bigger, faster. If you want to include this, MAKE SURE to send me the word "Purr!" in bold! Just so I know. Sometimes people don't read this stuff, and I gotta know whether or not I'll be the one causing the growth, so I don't surprise them or accidentally godmod somewhat.
[/collapse][/color][/collapse][/color]
[color=purple][collapse=A Selection of Sizes.][color=gray]
I don't have size limits, but there are a few places I like to start at, for examples. For those actually into hyper, multiply the endowments sizes by something between 2-10 times bigger.
[color=white][b]--5'8"--[/b][/color]
Her default size. Check the info tab for more on that.
[color=white][b]--8'7"--[/b][/color]
A bit of a bigger form for her. Slightly visible muscles, that given her size alone are enough to make her very decently strong.
-Cock Size: 15" long, 4.5" wide.
-Breast Size: 8 inches wide each.
-Asscheek Size: 7 inches wide, each.
[color=white][b]--12'1"--[/b][/color]
Probably about twice your height, an absolutely perfect size for any sort of long term RP where she's bigger.
-Cock Size: 22" (1'10") long, 6.6" wide.
-Breast/Asscheek Size: 10 inches wide each.
[color=white][b]--15'--[/b][/color]
Getting a bit larger, here's another decent example.
-Cock Size: 33" (2'9") long, 7.25" wide.
-Breast/Asscheek Size: 17 inches wide each.
[color=white][b]--50'--[/b][/color]
Heeere's a nice macro size, to get us started.
-Cock Size: 110" (9'2") long, 24.25" (2'0.25") wide.
-Breast/Asscheek Size: 56" (4'8") wide each.
[color=white][b]--100'--[/b][/color]
Heeere's a nice macro size, to get us started.
-Cock Size: 230" (19'2") long, 50.75" (4'2.75") wide.
-Breast/Asscheek Size: 112" (9'4") wide each.

[/color][/collapse][/color]
[color=red][collapse=Scenarios][color=gray]
[collapse=Ascension]
One, or possibly both, of us ascend into almost/absolute godhood. Whether it’s rising to an unimaginable size or rewriting reality itself, this is tons of fun to play. And if it’s just one of us rising, there’s so, so much fun to be had in their utter dominance over the other. Being able to lift them into the atmosphere with a finger, or even able to rework their body and mind at will, the sheer power the bigger person has makes things tons of fun. There’s endless fun to be had with it all, all up to how imaginative you can be.[/collapse]
[collapse=Time Periods]
Being the nerd I am, there’s a few time periods(/places within them particularly) that I absolutely enjoy. 
Most notably would be urban Russia during the revolution - Being a revolutionary, or being with one, is an odd fantasy I have. Of course, minimal references to actual people, and I wouldn’t actually include too much with the ideology that’s rising. Similarly, RPs taking place in a Soviet (Or rather, Soviet-inspired, look up Wolfhound Century) society would be interesting. Also stuff in post-Soviet states.
[small]I’m not a tanky though, I swear. There’s more.[/small]
Another similar idea would be Napoleonic France, things like that. I’m a slight nerd for revolutions, I guess.
1980s/1990s US would be absolutely great, too. I love the 80s aesthetic, and I’m sure the early 90s wouldn’t be too far off either. Just seems nice and comfy, I guess.
Early 2000s would be nice too. Nostalgic, I suppose.
A near future RP sounds like it’d be pretty nice. Close enough that it isn’t too sci-fi quite yet, but with some definite improvements to the current time. Not sure exactly what I’d want though.[/collapse]
[collapse=Canon Universes]
There’s a few lovely ones.
Titanfall’s universe
Digimon’s universe (Particularly Tamers)
Attack On Titan’s universe (As of the final season. Don’t spoil it for yourself.)
Evangelion’s universe (Not any permutation of it in particular I guess, and mostly avoiding the main action that happens in it.)
MLP’s universe (G4 of course.)
SAO’s universe might be interesting!
Reeeaally dunno about the JoJo universe for an RP, I don’t like focusing RPs on fights- but putting it here so people know I’ve watched it [i]all[/i], in case they actually have a good idea for it.
If you’ve ever read the book, Wolfhound Century’s universe is something I love. Dunno why, just hits my interests well.[/collapse]
[collapse=Frozen In Time]
There’s two version of this.
The First One - Trapped in a void, seemingly a pocket dimension.
It’s a blank, endless void of a world. A light gray plane stretching forever, with the same for the sky- albeit slightly lighter, and a little bluer. Light comes down from it like there’s a sun, but there’s noticeably nothing up there for your eyes to need shaded from. Around the starting point is a cluster of things- Dressers, drawers, cabinets, cooking appliances- All of which, strangely enough, are arranged into sort of wall-less ‘rooms’. Several couches, chairs, and idle tables making up a ‘living room’; cabinets, pantries, ovens and more making up a ‘kitchen’. Beds and drawers for a ‘bedroom’... etc. There were as many of those as you could name rooms in a house, walls only adorning the rooms that absolutely need them.
Another odd note, though- All the storage containers seem to idly cycle through insides as you open and close them. The second time you open a shirt drawer, there’s a different variety- and so forth. Though, once it eventually gets back to the first set of insides, if anything was taken out, it seems to have been restocked.

Lots of variables with this one, of course. Whether we age, whether we can actually leave on our own, maybe even having it all controlled by something or someone, it’s all subject to change according to the RP at hand.

The Second One - Time is genuinely frozen for everyone but us two, for some reason. I’ll leave us to figure out how that works when it happens.[/collapse]
[/color][/collapse][/color]
[color=white][collapse=Status Guide][color=gray]
[color=purple]Looking:[/color] Feel free to PM me!
[color=green]Online:[/color] Either just got on, or just idling around. Feel free to PM, but I might already be in one RP so it might be slower.
[color=blue]Busy:[/color] Most likely slow replies, and doing something else while I'm here. Feel free to PM me if you want an RP that almost completely lines up with my favorites, but otherwise probably wait a bit.
[color=yellow]Away:[/color] Not here! Feel free to leave me something to come back to.
[color=orange]Do Not Disturb:[/color] Either depressed or pissed.
[color=pink]Idle:[/color] Was AFK for too long! Leave a message!
[/color][/collapse][/color]
[/indent][url=https://curiouscat.me/Tigergriffin]Ask me anything![/url]

[hr]
[img=1818727]tigerartowner[/img][sup](Except for two, they’re sorta shared with someone else)[/sup]

40360389.name: Approaching IC
40360389.description: ONLY if you properly set the scene with the post. It's not to be an excuse to fuck in a complete void.

39992255.name: Mind Expansion
39992255.description: Usually not as literal as brains growing, but generally just characters getting much, much smarter. Even better if at some point, that intelligence lets them break the rules of reality- rewriting the world around them with their sheer knowledge, etc.. Makes for some fun scenes and stories!

37378826.name: OOC - Art Requirers
37378826.description: It's honestly a form of poor-shaming at this point. I learned to RP multi-paragraph posts, months before I got a single piece of actually decent art. I found out how much people cling onto those with art, how much people ignore those who don't have it, and I don't want to have anything to do with those kinds of people. If you can't stand the thought of playing with someone without a picture to jack off to, then I'm sorry, but I'm not all that interested. How do I know you won't finish from the pic alone, before I even get to enjoy myself with the play?

38969049.name: -Thinking I'm not interested
38969049.description:
I've fallen into this pit a lot myself. Someone doesn't approach first, so you assume they're not interested. Truth is, while I've been doing my best to get, well, less shy- I'm still terrible at bringing up the courage to approach people. *Especially* the people that I find hot. There's next to zero chance that I won't be interested- If at least most of our kinks match, or if not, then at the very least you like growth, macro, or hyper- then know that there's zero chance I would reject you. So come try your luck! The odds are stacked in your favor.
And if you can't think of anything- If you don't have any ideas, or you just don't know what to say- Just send me the word "Purple" by itself, and I'll take things from there!

38871563.name: Trait - Goth Aesthetic
38871563.description: It's just so fucking hot, lol

38840387.name: Plot - Gain over time
38840387.description: One thing I absolutely LOVE is slow growth over the course of a long RP. Days passing while one of us- Possibly me, hehe- grows bigger and bigger each one. Even better if it’s caused by something like eating or the like.

38703607.name: +Selfcest- You play Tiger too!
38703607.description: An odd idea, but a wonderful one! Tiger's hot, and I wouldn't mind fucking myself. Especially seeing how other people play as me, how they see me, etc.

38605586.name: +Literally ANYONE is welcome!
38605586.description: I'm pansexual. I'm open to pretty much every single species under the sun. I don't give a heck whether you have art, or you even have a profile pic. Don't ever, ever feel shy to meet me! I always want to do anything I can to be friendly, and I want to be as approachable as possible. It's genuinely rare for me to reject someone, so at the very least, try your luck!

38592477.name: Scenario- Under your power
38592477.description: You having more power than she does, to a massive extent. Something about her being powerless compared to her partner is just so, sooo hot. Even more so, when it gets even more extreme. Her being scared of you is a good start- But it gets so, soo much fucking better the further it goes. Even if she isn't aware- If you can rewrite her mind, her entire existence with a mere thought. God, that's sooo fucking hot. Her entire reality yours to play with, with absolutely nothing about her off limits. Make her a speck compared to a divinity (Though not literally, unless you're reeeally good at describing extreme size difference.)

38292879.name: -Racial/Disability slurs
38292879.description: I'm fine with other slurs if it's for degradation, but this is my absolute fucking limit. And if you're using this kind of this outside of a private RP, fuck off.

38080223.name: +READ IF IT APPLIES - Violence
38080223.description: Pretty much any and all violence is absolutely fine if it's with micros. If it's with people at the same size, then don't seriously harm the bits. Gnawing and such is fine, but I don't want those parts genuinely scratched or injured during the play. The rest of the body is pretty much fair game though.

38067050.name: Scenario - Reality Being Yours
38067050.description: It's weird but, basically, just a scene where reality itself is controlled by you/your character. You can do anything with Tiger, can go anywhere with her, can even blur the lines between it and our reality for extra fun.

38014867.name: OOC - PM Sniping
38014867.description:
I've been here just to hang out a surprising amount of time recently.
If I've been on Online for like, over 10 minutes, then try your luck. Might've logged in and been AFK, or might just be in a really blank mood.

37890527.name: Thick Tentacles
37890527.description: As long as it's not spaghetti anymore, than I'll probably like it.

37707845.name: Act - Cock Transformation
37707845.description: Stuff me full of cock, then turn me into it- I absolutely love this, as long as it actually leaves your cock as big as (If not bigger) than I was.

37643083.name: Phrase - "Dirty Tailhole"
37643083.description:
Scat is in my fucking nos for a reason. Please, for fuck's sake, don't ruin a scene like this. 
Cleaning it with your tongue is fine, if you're cleaning pre or cum. But you're not cleaning anything else, because it's not fucking in there, and I don't wanna fucking imagine that.

37536728.name: IC/OOC - Shi/Hir option
37536728.description:
If you have a problem with these pronouns, why? It's hard enough for nonbinary people. A lot of nonbinary don't want to use they/them because of the confusion with multiple stuff, but they obviously don't want to use she/her or he/him because that's obviously the two default options. It also helps differentiate, should there be multiple characters.
So if you're against shi/hir just because it 'looks cringey', get that stick 5 miles out of your ass and shut the fuck up. Every word is fucking made up, dumbass. So give it some time, get used to them, and they'll stop sounding so weird.

35385889.name: Act - Big top, little bottom
35385889.description: Some people thing it's cliché and overdone. I think those people are crazy, because it's hot as absolute fuck.

32226482.name: IC/OOC - Wordplay!
32226482.description: Onomatopoeia, alliteration, all sorts of things to spice it up.

34344982.name: OOC - Vore Graveyards
34344982.description: If you do this shit, fuck you. People work hard on their characters, and it hurts to see them lost because of a split-second decision and you being so inhumanly remorseless that you’ll let them throw them away completely for your own wicked amusement. It’s already bad enough that these profiles are built specifically to hurt people with sensitive egos and less stable self worths, and you dragging other people into your bullshit only makes it worse. Just please, FUCK OFF.

33050942.name: Act - Vaginal Sex (Receiving)
33050942.description: I much prefer anal, but I do have moods for this from time to time. And no, this doesn't mean I'm always giving.

32226480.name: OOC/IC - Transphobia
32226480.description:
Fuck off. Learn some goddamn empathy in this cruel, unforgiving world. - - - If you genuinely believe that this thing, that more often not puts you through social and familial suicide should it be exposed, that can put you in actual risk of MURDER by extreme enough people, is a fucking CHOICE, then FUCK OFF.
Not to mention I'm trans, so if you've got a problem with it at all, don't fucking contact me.

32460364.name: Act - Tongue-Fucking Kisses
32460364.description: Really deep kisses that end up with forcing that tongue deep down your throat or mine. Works best with a bit of size difference.

32257043.name: Trait - Tentacles
32257043.description: As long as they're not the entire focus.

37362737.name: OOC - Tell me your limits!
37362737.description: Sooo many people come to me asking me to tell them just how big I plan on going- And to answer that, I need to know just how big you'll *let* me go. I'm a huge size queen.

35713578.name: Act - Take my clothes off.
35713578.description: Dunno what it is about it, but someone taking my clothes off for me is kinda hot.

36117015.name: Act - Starting drunk
36117015.description: It's fun, it gets things lewd a lot faster, and it helps in a variety of ways as for a cause for size changes, should those happen.

35882155.name: IC/OOC - Skipping the play
35882155.description: Don't give me two posts and then ask me to fucking put you on my profile. Don't just 'pats your little head' and ask me how it feels to be so tiny compared to you. I don't fucking know, how DOES it feel to be so tiny to someone when for all you know they could be an inch taller, or bigger than the fucking universe?

32226486.name: OOC - (Lack of!) Size Limits
32226486.description: If growth is the absolute focus, then there is none. And even then- as long as it's not just one person a million times bigger than the other, with nothing else to play with, I'm fine with infinite sizes. Breaking planets, galaxies, universes- breaking into our own universe, should you be daring.

32231377.name: Act - Size-Draining Endosoma
32231377.description: It's basically just draining someone's size while they're in their mouth, kinda like how the same happens with a mint or something as it dissolves, though this is just generally their whole height.

36658702.name: IC/OOC - Shorter responses
36658702.description: A lot of the time, if I really am enjoying it, I'll probably end up giving you much longer posts. You don't have to match these, so don't feel bad! And it's completely fine to do shorter posts when it's obvious that a longer one definitely isn't needed (For example, when you're just responding to what my character said real quick before I keep going).

36770374.name: OOC - Profile Worshippers
36770374.description: If you dedicate your profile to some super dommy character, or go around telling people to worship one, please fuck off. I can't stand this shit, and I'm blocking people who do it now. Every time I see one of these pieces of shit, it makes me die a little inside. Why the hell does anyone have any interest in someone who doesn't care about them back? Sure, degradation and shit is hot, but at this point you're just hurting yourself to serve some fucking asshole's power fetish. And I won't fucking stand being advertised to for said assholes.

32827704.name: OOC - Profile Play
32827704.description: This has to be earned. Don't come up to me and try to weasel your way into my profile just for your power fetish. Actually RP with me, let me build off of you and enjoy it, and let me help you enjoy it too, and then maybe I'll consider it. If you want on my profile, you gotta earn it. And even then, you're not taking up the whole damn thing.

33778993.name: Trait - Spaghetti Dick
33778993.description: One huge one is fine, but after more than like, 2, it's pretty much a tentacle monster. Not really much interest in that, unfortunately.

32226492.name: OOC/IC - Post Perspective
32226492.description: 3rd Person preferred in public rooms with lots of people, but 1st or 2nd are my favorites.

37498404.name: OOC - Person Cooking focus
37498404.description: Not really my thing, unfortunately. I don't know much about actual cooking (Besides desserts, I suppose) in the first place, let alone spending all that time cooking a person. Or being cooked either, I dunno.

32557520.name: IC - Parentplay
32557520.description: Recently became one of my main kinks, let me know if you're fine with including it!

32226536.name: IC - Parental Nicknames
32226536.description: Not exactly incest, just calling someone 'Mommy' and stuff like that. Reeeally fucking hot for some reason.

35795095.name: OOC - Outside-RP Meta shit
35795095.description: Talking about bookmarker counts or view counts are the fastest way to make me feel like shit. Please, for fuck's sake, have some damn mercy for my emotions. I'm weirdly sensitive about it, I know it sounds stupid.

33068044.name: IC/OOC - One word response.
33068044.description: Just.. Seriously? Please, don't let me type a whole fucking paragraph if this is all the effort you're putting in.

33719952.name: IC/OOC - Numbers
33719952.description: I love seeing the numbers and measurements of growth, up to a point. Once we're past 500 feet, I'd rather just use comparisons; Not that you shouldn't already be using a lot of them anyways.

32583714.name: Act - Nonconsensual Sex
32583714.description: Only in macro/micro settings, where the bottom is a micro. Otherwise, it has to be dubcon. I don't want to spend the whole scene feeling like shit because I have a little too much empathy to do this kind of thing. I don't like RPing people fighting, or having to keep hurting someone just so they can fuck them. This isn't fun to me, and it makes me feel like shit. And like I said, the only exception is when it's bettw

32226526.name: Act - Any Nipple Sucking
32226526.description: While I prefer lactation, I'd absolutely love to suck on them even without the wonderful reward.

35716449.name: IC - Meta stuff
35716449.description: For some reason, I absolutely love it when one of our characters acknowledges the existence of the other person behind the screen. Making casual comments about how they hope they're enjoying it, or how they themselves are.. I love that. But don't go too far with it. No asking for details about IRL, just hinting at knowing that it exists, or speaking 'to the person behind the screen.' But don't mention shit like your character's view counts or bookmarker counts, that's the fastest way to make me feel like shit.

35998036.name: OOC - Just say no!~
35998036.description:
Firstly, I just want to say- I DO read your kinks before I approach you. Honestly, I've always been so paranoid to approach people, it'd be weird for me not to. So please don't just look at this and think I ignore people's preferences and try to force stuff anyways. 
If you aren't interested, just type back the word 'No', and I'll leave you alone.

32845800.name: OOC - Hyper pussy/gape art
32845800.description: Really doesn't appeal to me, I'm already not that into pussies.

32845973.name: Trait - Human Cock
32845973.description: Horsecock and canine cock are much preferred. Dunno why, just not that interesting.

37376005.name: Species - Anything with hooves
37376005.description: I aaaaaaaabsolutely love these! Not just because hooves are hot, but also because horsecocks usually come with them, and are hot as fuck.

32226537.name: Act - Guts, organs, and brains
32226537.description: It messes with me. Blood is fine though, for some reason.

32226532.name: Act - Those GOOD names!
32226532.description:
Princess / Good girl / Sweet Baby Girl
Something about this just sounds so right, so feel free to call me it.

36597836.name: Act-Getting her drunk/hypno/et
36597836.description: Make her a hazy little gryphon- Make her huff so much musk that she can't think, leave her just your little 'kitten', broken and horny and lustful. Maybe even brainwashed, mentally destroyed and dependent on You.~

32816548.name: OOC - Choosing my own growth.
32816548.description: I much prefer my partner to be the one telling me how much bigger I get, and I'll be happy to do the same for them. Dice also works!

37234295.name: Act - Female on female
37234295.description: I don't like scissoring, and I usually need a cock somewhere to be interested. If not, it can be replaced by excessive kink stuff.

35300064.name: Act - Feedback Loop Growth
35300064.description:
Growth that triggers more growth. I.e. drinking milk that makes the drinker lactate more, forcing them to drink more milk...

Copied from Jordan the Griffon!

32226521.name: Trait - Fat
32226521.description: As long as you're snuggly, and especially if you're hyper in other ways.

34178699.name: IC/OOC - Fake Irl
34178699.description: First person RPing where we start from like, where we are IRL. For example, talking about how this RP is making you grow IRL too if that's the focus of it. Maybe even coming over to the other person, and fucking. Even better if they simply grow enough to see eachother.

32929960.name: OOC - Fake friendliness
32929960.description: It's funny how the friendliest seeming people here don't even seem to acknowledge the existence of people they won't fuck. Not even a wave, saying hi, or even responding to them when they speak. And at the same time, they do all these things for every last person who they would. It's not that hard to show the same amount of kindness to everyone, and it's outright rude to ignore one person's waving to them, only to worship another's mere breathing. Note: No event to prompt an ignore, nothing ever even happening between the two. Just one person being a picky asshole.

32557311.name: Trait - Extremely small.
32557311.description: To be honest, the 'being small' part doesn't really turn me on at all. But someone else seeming, especially actually being, big, is hot as fuck. So I'm fine with it, I suppose, but I'd prefer for the bigger person to get bigger, rather than the smaller person getting smaller.

37498428.name: Act- Excessive growth/sizes
37498428.description: Growth is one of my absolute favorites! And of course, the actual process of it is one of the things that turns me on most, not just the sizes, and what you do with them. So if you describe it well enough, I'll be much, muuuch more than happy to outgrow literally anything that we could make comparisons too- But of course, being all the way up there, if the growing ends, make sure to give me something to play with. Whether it be changes to myself, or you, anything works.

32226522.name: Trait - Donut-pucker-anus
32226522.description: I can live with it, but generally would rather not.

32226540.name: Character Type - Divinities!
32226540.description: The main appeal to divinities for me is them, for whatever reason, caring about such an insignificant little gryphon. I love the concept immensely, and would love to do it. But for whatever reason, I'm weird in that I can't stand them treating Tiger as second-class to anyone other than themself, who I'm fine with them doing that for. I have no idea why, but the idea just messes with my head.

32866432.name: OOC - Differing perspectives
32866432.description:
One person roleplays in first person, the other in third person. Just gotta address the other person differently to how you address your own character/yourself.
Basically just a workaround for people's differing preferences.

37498533.name: Trait - Dicknipples
37498533.description: They're starting to warm up to me a bit, and I'm glad.

32226534.name: Act -Convincing your character
32226534.description: I don't want to go through the process of explaining to your character why we should fuck.

32405495.name: OOC - Controlling me.
32405495.description: If you take control of my character, make it do a bunch of actions and not leaving me anything to do in my post, how am I supposed to respond? Literally the only thing I can do at all is restate everything you said and add my purring. How is that supposed to be fun for me at all?

35997993.name: Act - Cockfucking
35997993.description:
It's an odd thing- I'm fine with it at times, but if everyone I'm RPing with drives it into the ground, then I can't stand it. Just don't expect it every time.

Check where it is every once in a while, because of such.

37498534.name: Me - Beakless Rhiley
37498534.description: Lots of people don't like it, and I really don't mind playing without it, so why not?~

32226511.name: OOC - Art-Worshippers
32226511.description: People who worship those with art, and ignore those without it. Who don't have enough of a brain to imagine characters, nor enough of one to stop harassing anyone who can't afford art. They don't understand that some people don't have the money for commissions, and borrow art just so they can at least have something for their character. They call anyone who does this art pirates, despite the art-borrower inline being the first fucking thing on their profiles. They admire those with more art, seeing them as better people just because they have more money.

32226529.name: List - A bunch of hot canons.
32226529.description: Asriel, Renamon, SCP-1471, Darkstalker (Wings of Fire), Scar (Lion king), Queen Chrysalis, Princess Luna/Nightmare Moon, Draeneis in general, Widowmaker (Without the thing on her head, if possible.), Gideon's huge fucking sexy otter twins, Mal0, King Sombra, Exveemon, Lord Kass, Loona
